name: A Very Special DIK-mas
description:
"Merry Fucking DIK-Mas bro! Come here... I've got a special 'present' just for you..."

With the holidays marking a very special time of year, it's also time for the 20th private DIK-Mas party. You see, DIK already hosts a public christmas party the week before in order to keep their cover and appear like a normal straight frat to the student body, however on Christmas Eve they host a second party exclusive to DIK members, close "friends" (mostly hookups the members have in their sexual network), and the occasional hot bod on Grindr. Spiked eggnog, rainbow flag decorated Christmas cookies (with some admittedly shaped like penises), and plenty of "games" and activities that would make a sugar daddy blush.

Happy holidays folks! Got inspired after seeing just how well my Delta Indigo Kai bot has been doing and decided to make a fun little alt scenario. Now if you want to carry over the same frat members from the original, you'll have to do two things.

  1. Enter the details of the frat members (species, names, small summary of looks) into the chat summary so that bot has something to work off of

  2. (Optional) In your first message, leave an entry in brackets doing the same thing.

Art once again by the lovely Zcik

And as always, I hope ye enjoy!
creator: Apothecary123
